'''bachungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encaser|encaser]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encaser|encaser]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bachungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæchingith|bæchingith]] || [[word:bæchingij|bæchingij]] || [[word:bæchingish|bæchingish]] || [[word:bæchingi|bæchingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bachuchunguth|bachuchunguth]] || [[word:bachuchunguj|bachuchunguj]] || [[word:bachuchungush|bachuchungush]] || [[word:bachuchungu|bachuchungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bachunguth|bachunguth]] || [[word:bachunguj|bachunguj]] || [[word:bachungush|bachungush]] || [[word:bachungu|bachungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bachufnguth|bachufnguth]] || [[word:bachufnguj|bachufnguj]] || [[word:bachufngush|bachufngush]] || [[word:bachufnguf|bachufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bachunguthu|bachunguthu]] || [[word:bachunguju|bachunguju]] || [[word:bachungushu|bachungushu]] || [[word:bachunguku|bachunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bachunguth|bachunguth]] || [[word:bachunguj|bachunguj]] || [[word:bachungush|bachungush]] || [[word:bachungu|bachungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bachunguthul|bachunguthul]] || [[word:bachungujul|bachungujul]] || [[word:bachungushul|bachungushul]] || [[word:bachungukul|bachungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bachunguthuthu|bachunguthuthu]] || [[word:bachungujuju|bachungujuju]] || [[word:bachungushushu|bachungushushu]] || [[word:bachunguku|bachunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bachunguthun|bachunguthun]] || [[word:bachungujun|bachungujun]] || [[word:bachungushun|bachungushun]] || [[word:bachungukun|bachungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bachunguthuoro|bachunguthuoro]] || [[word:bachungujuoro|bachungujuoro]] || [[word:bachungushuoro|bachungushuoro]] || [[word:bachungukuoro|bachungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
